prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖南师范大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约28186名→33352名→45630名→70326名→52899名。整体呈波动上升趋势，2021至2024年位次持续后 移（数字增大），2025年出现明显回升（数字减小），近5年位次波动幅度较大，2025年基准位次约52899名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划持续扩增：2021年12 0人、2022年149人、2023年151人、2024年184人、2025年217人、2026年230人。2026年较2025年扩招13人（+5.99%），连续多年扩招趋势明显，对考生而言竞争压力有 所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在第86–92位（2026年排名第92位），属于中上游211院校，在师范类 高校中具有较高认可度；2025年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，涉及文学院教授公开羞辱求助学生的师德师风事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制 作用；抖音综合热度排名第100位（评价一般），短视频平台关注度不高；近年无显著投档断档或录取异常记录，报考热度整体平稳；第五轮学科评估中，湖南 师范大学A-及以上学科仅外国语言文学（A-）1个，无A或A+学科，优势学科数量较少，对高分考生的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 山东省2026年普通高考考生总数约 72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模持续扩大，整体竞争加剧；湖南师范大学位于湖南省长 沙市，在山东省属于跨省招生，无本地生源保护效应；该校在山东招生计划逐年增加，反映出对山东生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次52899名、2026年扩招约6 %的缓解效应、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%带来的竞争加剧，以及声誉偏负面和优势学科有限的综合影响，预计2026年最低录取位次。预测最低 位次约54770名，区间54270–55270名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 28,186 → 33,352 → 45,630 → 70,326 → 52,899. Overall, there is a fluctuating upward trend, with rankings continuously moving backward (increasing numbers) from 2021 to 2024, and a significant rebound in 2025 (decreasing numbers). Over the past 5 years, the ranking fluctuations have been large, with a baseline ranking of approximately 52,899 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province's comprehensive category has been continuously expanding: 120 in 2021, 149 in 2022, 151 in 2023, 184 in 2024, 217 in 2025, and 230 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an increase of 13 students (+5.99%), with a clear trend of expansion over multiple years, alleviating competition pressure for candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 86–92 in recent years (ranked 92nd in 2026), placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions, with high recognition among normal universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving an incident where a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 100th (average evaluation), with low attention on short video platforms. In recent years, there have been no significant admission gaps or abnormal admission records, and the application heat has been generally stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan Normal University had only one A- or above discipline: Foreign Language and Literature (A-), with no A or A+ disciplines, resulting in a relatively small number of advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Shandong Province general college entrance examination is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to approximately 681,000 in 2025, with the candidate scale continuing to expand and overall competition intensifying. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and recruits across provinces in Shandong, with no local student protection effect. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong has been increasing year by year, reflecting its emphasis on Shandong student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 52,899 in 2025, the alleviation effect of an approximately 6% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from an approximately 5.7% increase in the total number of Shandong candidates, and the combined impact of a somewhat negative reputation and limited advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 54,770, with a range of 54,270–55,270.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature (Normal) (including Shicheng College Chinese Language and Literature Base Class)
- Accounting
- Ideological and Political Education (Normal).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Education (Normal)
- History (Normal) (including Shicheng College History National Liberal Arts Base Class)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Economics
- Electronic Information Science and Technology
- Software Engineering
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Tourism Management
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 54,270–55,270, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<54,270), you can focus on reaching for popular majors in Tier 1 such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature (Normal), etc. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>55,270), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Given the university's weak advantageous disciplines, it is advisable to prioritize socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and core Normal majors when applying.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学医学类在山东省近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年27797名（计划17人）、2022年28453名（计划26人）、2023年30680名（计划26人）、2024年70326名（计划42 人）、2025年52899名（计划38人）。2024年因医学类大幅扩招至42人，位次显著下降至7万余名；2025年缩招至38人后位次迅速回升至5.2万余名。2026年招生计划进一步缩减至3 4人（临床医学16人、药学10人、预防医学6人、医学检验技术2人），较2025年减少4人，缩招幅度约10.5%，预计将继续推动位次上行（更难录取）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、双一流建设高校（非985），位于湖南省长沙市。作为一所综合性师范大学，其医学部（医学院）在师范类院校中医学实力较为突出 ，临床医学专业在山东省认可度较高，整体学校层次对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续高涨，临床医学尤为突出。湖南师范大学在山东省医学类招生规模适中（2026年34人），专业涵盖临床医学、药学、预防医学、医学检验技术， 其中临床医学竞争最为激烈。学校地处华中地区，距离山东省较远，但医学类专业跨省报考意愿较强，地域因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年湖南师范大学医学类在山东省最低录取位次约为49058名，波动区间为48558至49558名。受招生计划持续缩减影响，位次较2025年 （52899名）进一步上行，录取难度有所增加。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内，建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Shandong Province over the past five years are: 2021: 27,797 (planned 17 students), 2022: 28,453 (planned 26 students), 2023: 30,680 (planned 26 students), 2024: 70,326 (planned 42 students), 2025: 52,899 (planned 38 students). In 2024, due to a significant expansion of medical programs to 42 students, the ranking dropped sharply to over 70,000; in 2025, after reducing enrollment to 38 students, the ranking quickly rebounded to over 52,000. In 2026, the enrollment plan further decreases to 34 students (Clinical Medicine 16, Pharmacy 10, Preventive Medicine 6, Medical Laboratory Technology 2), a reduction of 4 students compared to 2025, a decrease of about 10.5%, which is expected to continue pushing the ranking upward (making admission more difficult).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national key university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university (not 985), located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. As a comprehensive normal university, its medical department (School of Medicine) has relatively outstanding medical strength among normal universities. The Clinical Medicine program has high recognition in Shandong Province, and the overall university level has a certain appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has continued to rise, with Clinical Medicine being particularly prominent. Hunan Normal University's medical enrollment in Shandong Province is moderate (34 students in 2026), covering Clinical Medicine, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine, and Medical Laboratory Technology, with Clinical Medicine being the most competitive. The university is located in Central China, far from Shandong Province, but cross-provincial applications for medical programs are relatively strong, so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Shandong Province in 2026 is approximately 49,058, with a fluctuation range of 48,558 to 49,558. Due to the continuous reduction in enrollment plans, the ranking will further rise compared to 2025 (52,899), increasing the difficulty of admission.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (School of Medicine, Xianjiahu Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Medical Laboratory Technology (School of Medicine, Xianjiahu Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Preventive Medicine (School of Medicine, Xianjiahu Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
